v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Lean mechanism registry — the compiler's vocabulary. MechanismEntry{mech_id, ontology_type, causal_role, required_state, parameter_source(free text), temporal_scale, calibration_status(calibrated|prior|uncalibrated|experimental), domains, operator(string key into transitions registry), experimental}. 11 foundational entries. Unknown ids raise; compiler must mark unknowns experimental.
entries: poll_error_aggregation(experimental, NO V2 OPERATOR — v1 kernel unported)
whipcount_binomial(experimental, NO V2 OPERATOR — v1 kernel unported)
v2_mechanism_plumbing.executes_on_shared_state: indirect — entry.operator names a transitions-registry operator that runs on WorldState+clock and emits StateDelta
gaps_vs_strict_spec: calibration_status enum unenforced (scheduled_facts injects an inline mech dict with status 'deterministic' bypassing register_mechanism)
kind vocabulary (ontology_type) differs from target kinds (no market/algorithm/queue/operational/physical/legal/external-adapter)

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Operator registry + StateDelta contract. register_operator(name, operator, requires, modifies, temporal_scale, parameter_source, invariants, validated, experimental). TransitionOperator interface: applicable(world,event) -> propose(world,event,rng)->TransitionProposal -> validate (default: every institution's validate_action) -> apply -> StateDelta. StateDelta{at, event_type, operator, changes[{path,before,after}], reason_codes, uncertainty, evidence_deps, follow_up_events}. get_operator refuses unknown names and gates experimental behind allow_experimental.
v2_mechanism_plumbing.provenance: parameter_source free text + invariants tuple on registration; per-delta reason_codes/uncertainty/evidence_deps
findings: ALL 32 registered operators have validated=True and experimental=False — 'validated' means contract-tested, not empirically calibrated; the operator-level experimental gate is dead code in practice
requires/modifies are advisory strings never checked against actual StateDelta.changes
follow_up_events on the delta is the endogenous event channel (validated+queued by the engine)

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: WorldState typing + clock. StateField(value|dist)+Provenance{status observed|derived|inferred|assumed|sampled, sources, confidence, method, updated_at, dependencies, calibrated, uncertainty_type, valid_from/until, sensitivity, lineage}. Entity with closed ENTITY_FIELDS + register_entity_extension (typed extension door, incl. latent_state namespace). SimulationClock{now, as_of; advance_to refuses backward}. WorldState{entities, populations, network, institutions, quantities, information, objects(WorldObject), scenario_schema, semantic_log, mechanism_instances, parent_version, evidence_hash, versions, uncertainty_meta, omissions}. clone() deep-copies for counterfactual branches. WorldBranch carries weight + [StateDelta] log.
gaps: dynamic attrs added outside the dataclass by other modules (world.temporal_hazards) — untyped seam
no typed registry of state paths, so read_set/write_set strings have no schema to validate against

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Event-driven real-time queue. register_event_type(name, participants, preconditions, scheduling scheduled|hazard|endogenous, visibility, reads, deltas, duration_s, parameter_source, validated). Event carries ts, etype (must be registered), participants, payload, visibility, source(scheduled|hazard:x|endogenous:op), causal metadata (event_id, parent_ids, dependency_ids, microstep, read_set, write_set, trigger). EventQueue: heap + StochasticHazard (exponential inter-arrival, optional rate_fn(world)), pop_batch pops same-timestamp batches for causal microstep layering (insertion order carries no semantics).
findings: event-level read_set/write_set exists but is a third, separate declaration site from operator requires/modifies and event-type reads/deltas — none reconciled

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Per-scenario GENERATED semantics: ScenarioSemanticModel with mechanism_definitions{description, causal_role(always mechanism_mediated), triggering_event_types, accepted_inputs, controlling_actor_or_system, authority_requirements, preconditions, required_records/resources, state_machine, initial/intermediate/success/failure/unresolved states, transition_rules, possible_output_event_types{on_success,on_failure}, possible_record_updates, observation_rules, timing_rules, evidence_basis, assumptions, uncertainty_source, executor_binding}. MECHANISM_EXECUTOR_BINDINGS = ('', generic_state_machine, institutional_aggregation, conserved_resource_settlement, information_transport, event_scheduling, population_response). Deterministic validation rejects numeric minting, human-reaction coefficients, undeclared references; LLM critic pass; frozen then branch-local versioned extension (extend_schema).
findings: this is the ONLY registry whose entries declare event inputs+outputs and per-mechanism state machines — the closest existing shape to the target MechanismSpec, but per-question and untrusted-LLM-generated, never global

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Layer contract A/B/C/D (actor_controlled / mechanism_mediated / actor_mediated / terminal_readout). MechanismInstance{instance_id, mechanism_id, branch_id, state, status pending|succeeded|failed|unresolved, inputs, escrow, transitions[], provenance} lives on world.mechanism_instances (branch-local via deep copy). invoke_mechanism_op validates existence/authority/preconditions/inputs, escrows required resources, schedules ctrl_mechanism_step. MechanismRuntimeOperator resolution order: declared executable transition_rules -> neutral executor bindings (institutional aggregation over real decision records; conserved-resource settlement w/ escrow+refund) -> single declared next state -> LLM adjudication (one concrete state, probabilities forbidden, labeled model_based_unvalidated) -> honest unresolved. MechanismCompiler + boundary critic generate the scenario's mechanism model.
findings: instantiated directly in materialize.py, NOT via the string operator registry — a second binding mode
conservation enforced operationally through escrow/settle/refund, not declared as a rule

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: In-run world dynamics: StanceReviewOperator (event-driven ripeness/winning/exhaustion/bandwagon stance moves, one level, material-change hysteresis), PersistenceCheckOperator (provisional absorption holds or collapses; resumes first-passage), contested_attrition_interval (per-day capacity drain over exact elapsed time), COUPLING_PRIORS (10 documented lognormal priors sampled once per branch; fit_coupling_pack importance-reweights from scored trajectories; experiments/replay_vault_v3/coupling_pack.json NOT present -> running on documented priors), declare_actor_capacity.
v2_mechanism_plumbing.provenance: sampled_coupling persists draws as quantities sampled_coupling:<name>; coupling_pack_info reports fitted vs documented_priors_unfitted

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Typed quantity registry: register_quantity_type(name, units, lo, hi, temporal_resolution, observation_model); Quantity{name, qtype, value, sd, timestamp, prov} with clamp(). The ONLY place units exist.
gaps: operators register ad-hoc quantity types at apply time (units='bool'/'fact'/'share') — units are per-quantity, never per-mechanism; no dimensional checking

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Continuous-time first-passage machinery: CumulativeHazardState{threshold Exp(1) particle-rooted, accumulated Lambda, base_rates piecewise over 5 lifetime buckets, modulation, generation} persisted at world.temporal_hazards. Exact piecewise integration; on_state_change preserves Lambda + threshold (no redraw bias); schedule_crossing emits real queue events with generation guards; MODULATION_HOOKS registry; rates_from_target_mass gives mass-conservation identity Lambda_total = -ln(1-T).
v2_mechanism_plumbing.assessment: the natural backbone for an OutsideWorldProcess residual

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Fitted event-family base rates: FROZEN keyword family rules over question text; partial-pooled rates fit on calibration split only; pack experiments/replay_vault_v3/family_hazard_pack.json EXISTS (fitted). family_base_rate() feeds aggregate-outcome and structural-prior mechanisms as fitted_family_prior instead of broad Beta.

Scheduled-reality layer: LLM-extracted dated public facts (provenance evidence|model_knowledge, confidence, outcome_entailing + direction) executed deterministically by ScheduledFactOperator as typed quantities fact:<kind>:<entity> and fact_entailment; attach_scheduled_facts wires entailment into the outcome mechanism at weight 0.4.
findings: appends an inline accepted_mechanisms dict {mech_id: scheduled_reality, calibration_status: 'deterministic'} that never passes through register_mechanism — demonstrates the registry can be bypassed and the status enum is unenforced

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Phase 7: typed structural-form registry (forms.py — evaluable pure-Python shapes: logistic, Hill, thresholds, fatigue, hysteresis, change-point, mixtures, regime, survival, self-exciting; each with param_schema, monotonicity, extrapolation behavior, maturity), offline fit.py (numpy/scipy optional; provenance: dataset hash/split/seed/method/versions), applicability + transport gates (keep_linear verdicts, extrapolation classes), posterior propagation E[f(X)]!=f(E[X]), pooling, composition + safety guards, and three registered operators (nonlinear_state_step, nonlinear_mechanism, nonlinear_contagion) driven by nonlinear_spec on event payloads.
v2_mechanism_plumbing.assessment: the most spec-complete subsystem: forms carry param_schema + invariants + failure conditions — reuse its metadata vocabulary for MechanismSpec.parameter_schema

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: institutions.py: executable Rule kinds (decision_right, deadline, budget, eligibility, procedure, capacity, quorum — closed set, unknown kinds FAIL CLOSED) + RuleSystem.validate_action run before every transition + run_vote deterministic tally. institutions_v2 (Phase 10): FAMILY->TEMPLATE->INSTANCE store with evidence-backed versioned rules, AuthorityGraph hard authorization, InformationBoundary, StageEngine, family procedures (bicameral+veto/override, appellate, approval chains, queue service timing), competing rule-model particles via Phase-3 compositional posterior, InstitutionOperator registered as institution_action.

population.py: Population/PopulationSegment (weight StateField, heterogeneity dists, sensitivity), allocation prop to weight x uncertainty x sensitivity, particle sampling, check_marginals vs observed data. phase9_population.py: PopulationSpec + compositional Dirichlet weight posterior (Phase-3 engine), conjugate Beta-binomial segment-conditional rates, materialize_population_particles, poststratified_estimate; anti-ornamental latent specs.

network.py: typed RelationGraph with registered relation types, edges carrying strength dist/visibility/trust/channel/delay. phase9_network.py: MultilayerNetwork with per-edge Phase-3 existence posteriors (infer_edge_posterior; LLM proposes candidates only), missing-edge posteriors, dependency-free multi-restart EM StochasticBlockModel + BIC-penalized competing macro-structures. phase9_temporal.py: 8 typed edge transitions (trust_gain/loss, alliance_formation/defection via log-odds shifts; relationship_decay exponential half-life; edge_expiration; rewiring; role_change) emitting Phase9Delta.
gaps: phase9_temporal transitions emit Phase9Delta, not transitions.StateDelta, and are not in the operator registry — a parallel delta type

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Six registered consumers that make declared structure move the terminal: institutional_decision (threshold/quorum over posterior member propensities), population_aggregation, aggregate_outcome_mechanism (posterior base rate + bounded consumption of upstream causal state), structural_process_prior (broad Beta, exploratory), actor_action_aggregation (lexical polarity), network_diffusion (layer transmissibility broad priors). Scheduled only when activation_synthesis says the phase is causally required.

Event-time contract: terminal readout = per-particle first-passage times (readout, never resolver); operators absorption_monitor, hazard_round (dated outcome-entailing facts), first_passage (continuous-time cumulative hazard x sampled stance hazard-ratio x consumed state). mode_graph: typed END-STATES/PATHWAYS (actor-driven vs world-driven) + decision structures from which stance-combination law is derived. temporal_runtime: pop_batch -> causal layering -> declared-read deferral -> write-conflict resolution -> advance_interval (attrition, decay) — the default execution engine. temporal_compiler generates the scenario temporal model (channels, attention processes, decision triggers, recurring obligations).

semantic_registry: evidence-gated LLM semantic features with 10-status lifecycle (proposed..production_eligible, quarantined, rejected); seeded with REAL measured harm (interpretation channel quarantined everywhere tested). semantic_consequences: WorldObject typed facts, SemanticWorldEvent world-plane log, CommunicationDeliveryOperator (registered) delivering real content, typed predicate readouts.
findings: a third status vocabulary, incompatible with mechanisms.py and registry/record.py

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: The heavyweight mechanism registry: MechanismRecord (9-status lifecycle proposed|research_encoded|implemented|locally_validated|transfer_validated|production_eligible|domain_restricted|quarantined|rejected), ParameterPack with PARAMETER_SOURCES vocab (observed|inferred_from_data|fitted|published_research|reference_class_prior|experimental|assumed|unsupported), Citation with limits, ValidationRecord (failures preserved), ApplicabilityRule, transport module. 63 committed records + 17 packs in data/. store.py mirrors production records into the lean mechanisms.py registry. families/ implement executable transitions (hazard: FeatureHazardOperator; behavioral: 5 published-estimate families; diffusion: 6 contagion hazards fitted on Higgs; choice: Fehr-Schmidt QRE population; social/learning/interaction/structural).
v2_mechanism_plumbing.assessment: already ~90% of the target MechanismSpec fields — the vocabulary donor for the typed contract

v2_mechanism_plumbing.role: Tier 1-7 fallback hierarchy; generic_outcome_prior operator (broad Beta/Normal per-particle draw, tier 6/7, labeled exploratory) guarantees every coherent question resolves.

enron.py (fitted reply hazard buckets, recipient base rates, relationship/workload/time-of-day effects — status=fitted), behavior_games.py (fitted social-preference latents + cross-game transfer), higgs.py (network contagion fits), upworthy.py (population heterogeneity), omnibehavior.py (longitudinal persistence). These are the proof pattern for kind-typed fitted packs feeding FittedDecisionOperator.

operator_registry_live_inventory.note: from importing the modules; all validated=True, experimental=False

agent_decision.params: uniform reference policy unless fitted bound; LLM minting experimental-only

fitted_decision.params: fitted policy from a registry parameter pack

production_actor_policy.params: hierarchical fitted pack or Tier-7 broad mixture

institutional_vote.params: deterministic rule execution; writes typed outcome onto submission/process objects

poisson_arrival.params: hazard rate from plan; P=1-exp(-lambda*H) emerges from hazard sampling (ported v1 kernel)

persistence_check.params: documented persistence-survival priors, per-branch sampled, fittable

generic_outcome_prior.params: broad prior; tier 6/7; not empirically validated

institutional_decision.params: declared threshold/quorum; member propensity from evidence posterior

aggregate_outcome_mechanism.params: posterior base rate + bounded upstream-state consumption

actor_action_aggregation.params: lexical polarity of chosen typed actions

hazard_round.params: dated outcome-entailing facts; legacy grids ablation-only

first_passage.params: cumulative-hazard first passage; particle-matched thresholds; fitted family curve x stance hazard ratio

nonlinear_mechanism.params: fitted structural form + Phase-3 particles + transport widening

feature_hazard.params: fitted logistic pack, train split, transport widening

behavioral_mechanism.params: verified published estimates (Bass, ultimatum, trust game, GOTV, matching)

legacy_kernels.kernel: sim_aggregation (latent share vs threshold with empirical poll error 3-6pt)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: Monte-Carlo share ~ N(grounded share, poll-error sd) vs threshold; integrates measurement error so 52% lead != certainty
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: grounded poll/current share supplied by router; sd empirical 3-6pt default 0.06
legacy_kernels.v2_status: orphaned (declared as poll_error_aggregation MechanismEntry, experimental, empty operator — compiler rejects it loudly; pinned by tests/test_wmv2_tier_a_fixes.py)
legacy_kernels.reason: fills a declared dead registry entry; kind=measurement; trivial to express as an operator writing a quantities outcome from a latent share + observation model

legacy_kernels.kernel: sim_whipcount (undecideds break at grounded lean; Binomial vs needed threshold)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: committed_yes + Binomial(undecided, lean) >= needed; short-circuits when arithmetic decides
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: whip counts / party lean grounded by caller
legacy_kernels.reason: fills the second dead entry; kind=institution; complements institutional_vote (which needs simulated per-member actions) with a count-based aggregate when members are not individually modeled

legacy_kernels.kernel: sim_arrival (Poisson rare-event by deadline, lognormal rate uncertainty)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: P = 1 - exp(-lambda*H); lambda from rate_per_year or backed out of base_rate over ref_years
legacy_kernels.reason: DONE — RareEventArrivalOperator + StochasticHazard; closed form emerges from hazard sampling; the template for the other two

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: win prob from odds or 400-scale Elo diff with Gaussian rating noise
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=numerical; small, closed-form, domain-general (sports/court/race); no v2 equivalent

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: logit drift from pressure + reinforcement, horizon-amplified, Gaussian uncertainty
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: GDELT pressure signals; reinforcement gain assumed
legacy_kernels.reason: superseded by mode_graph world-driven pathways + nonlinear forms (threshold/saturation) + first_passage consumption of causal state; hand-set reinforcement gain fails v2 parameter-provenance rules

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: survival of the default under a disruption hazard
legacy_kernels.reason: exactly the first_passage/temporal_hazards machinery with a constant rate; porting would create a second survival path

legacy_kernels.kernel: FutureEvent calendar + SurpriseHazard + branching (discrete multimodal jump term)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: dated events with categorical outcome distributions, per-outcome jumps or resolution; Poisson surprise hazard; pivotal-branch decomposition; linear in K trajectories
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: calendar known; outcome dists grounded/judged; hazard base rates
legacy_kernels.v2_status: duplicated in structure (EventQueue scheduled+hazard events, scheduled_facts) but the categorical-outcome-distribution-per-dated-event kernel and surprise-jump residual are orphaned
legacy_kernels.reason: the strongest v1 backing for an OutsideWorldProcess residual: kind=exogenous; maps 1:1 onto queue events whose payload carries a typed outcome distribution resolved per branch

legacy_kernels.kernel: calibrated event-variance placement (calendar + background jump hazard; interval coverage)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: calibrate() fits jump frequency+magnitude from realized per-step moves; interval_coverage validates nominal coverage over the horizon
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=exogenous/market; gives the OutsideWorldProcess residual a CALIBRATED magnitude model rather than broad priors

legacy_kernels.kernel: heteroskedastic belief drift/variance (drift(state), log_var(state), decaying event drift)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: martingale-anchored; variance state-dependent (recent vol, boundary distance); no-cheat train fits
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=market/numerical; belief-series dynamics for market-type quantities between events; fitted, leakage-safe

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: predicts next belief from trajectory features + event features; null branch = efficient-market martingale baseline; optional LLM directional impact injection
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: fitted, pre-shift features only (no leakage); design follows Yu et al. 2026 SWM
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=numerical (belief dynamics for aggregate/market belief quantities); fitted provenance satisfies v2 rules; NOT for individual human actors (v2 actor policy owns that)

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: leakage-safe: belief lean predicts move direction at its calibration rate; explicitly not a point-forecast edge
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=measurement prior; fold into family_hazards-style base-rate machinery for questions with a live market/belief series

legacy_kernels.kernel: MeanFieldRollout (conformity + social proof + event shocks; influence-weighted aggregate)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: coupled belief evolution toward live aggregate; non-separable (dpi/dpj != 0); honestly held to beating the independent mean (EXP-053)
legacy_kernels.v2_status: orphaned (phase9 population is compositional/poststratified but has NO within-horizon coupled opinion dynamic; world_dynamics bandwagon is stance-level only)
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=population; the only validated coupled population dynamic in the repo; couplings must migrate to sampled_coupling-style documented priors / fitted packs

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: participation propensity coupled to aggregate momentum (mobilization/discouragement); cells from real survey/census rows
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: cell weights from data; coupling priors
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=population; complements phase9 poststratification with the participation-weighting dynamic; social_pressure_turnout pack (Phase 6, domain_restricted) covers only the GOTV effect

legacy_kernels.kernel: BayesianLogistic (Laplace posterior over weights; shrink toward prior mean w0; predict_dist integrates weight uncertainty; variance_contribution triage)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: MAP + Laplace covariance; uncertain weights WIDEN predictions instead of biasing
legacy_kernels.v2_status: duplicated in part (registry/ingestion.fit_logistic is point-estimate only)
legacy_kernels.reason: upgrade registry ingestion's estimation core so parameter packs carry weight POSTERIORS (parameter_schema + uncertainty) — feeds MechanismSpec.parameter_sources

legacy_kernels.kernel: elasticity_fit harness (prior-anchored logistic + per-recipient offset + ECE grade)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: estimator validated on synthetic ground truth (recovers known elasticities, calibrated held-out grade); real-world claim explicitly blocked on private data
legacy_kernels.parameter_provenance: beta shrunk toward world-knowledge priors; grade A/B/C/F by ECE
legacy_kernels.reason: as a Phase-6 pack PRODUCER (fitting harness), not a runtime mechanism; the graded-fit pattern is exactly MechanismSpec.calibration_status evidence

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: grounded Inglehart-axis heuristic, non-circular (never sees the answer), interpretable
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=population trait-prior source for segment heterogeneity fields; label reference_class_prior

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: finite-sample coverage guarantee under exchangeability; {0,1} set = honest abstention analog
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=measurement; belongs in MechanismSpec.validation_rules tooling + result support-grades, not as a world mechanism

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: held-out ECE with n>=30 gate
legacy_kernels.reason: unify as the single grader behind MechanismSpec.calibration_status transitions

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: textbook KKT-IC, Granovetter LT, Hawkes intensity; module itself labels output unvalidated until backtested
legacy_kernels.reason: superseded by Phase-6/7 FITTED diffusion families (simple/complex contagion, exposure_response — Higgs-validated; hawkes_self_excitation exists and is QUARANTINED on evidence); porting unfitted versions would regress provenance

legacy_kernels.kernel: LLM-decision cascade simulator (archetype reshare decisions on heavy-tailed follower graph)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: grade-or-abstain; ships ungraded
legacy_kernels.reason: LLM probability minting on the production path is exactly what gap-audit RC4 quarantined; nonlinear_contagion covers the class with fitted hazards

legacy_kernels.kernel: hierarchical individual response stack (pooled rates, EWMA recency, interactions, GBDT readout, Platt)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: as-of online evaluation, no leakage; ablation toggles
legacy_kernels.v2_status: already_ported (re-fitted natively in reference/enron.py as fitted mechanism packs; hierarchical_rate_shrinkage in Phase-6 registry)
legacy_kernels.reason: porting the old stack would duplicate the Enron reference world's leak-free fitted mechanisms

legacy_kernels.kernel: AggregateTransition + AggregateWorld (state-conditioned calibrated head + state recurrence)
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: state enters prediction; state transitions after outcomes; temporal-backtest grade
legacy_kernels.reason: the arbitrary-variable logistic-over-features path for human behavior is explicitly quarantined from v2 (pinned by test); its useful ideas (drift tracking, state-conditioned rates) already exist as nonstationarity + posterior machinery

legacy_kernels.old_location: swm/simulation/engine.py + reactions.py + world_rollout.py; grades in models/hn_simulation_grade.json
legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: multi-step segment reactions with state updates; graded on HN backtest
legacy_kernels.reason: platform-specific; the generalizable pieces (position bias, platform ranking, examination) already exist as Phase-6 platform families (position_bias_propensity domain_restricted)

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: windowed drift stat + interval widening under drift
legacy_kernels.reason: kind=measurement; feeds MechanismSpec transport/validity monitoring (a fitted pack whose base rate drifted should lose calibration_status)

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: entities with own step_fn/readout coupled on one clock
legacy_kernels.reason: WorldState + EventQueue + operators IS this, with provenance; nothing left to port

legacy_kernels.validated_semantics: IMPLEMENTED=False placeholders
legacy_kernels.reason: no implementation exists

existing_v2.role: exponential inter-arrival rate process (optionally state-dependent rate_fn), re-armed on firing
continuous-time first passage with particle-rooted Exp(1) thresholds, preserved accumulated hazard across rate changes, generation-guarded rescheduling, mass-conservation calibration identity
existing_v2.fit_for_outside_world_residual: PRIMARY backbone — an OutsideWorldProcess is one CumulativeHazardState per residual process with a fitted/base-rate intensity

existing_v2.role: leakage-safe fitted per-family base rates with partial pooling; feeds aggregate-outcome + structural priors
existing_v2.fit_for_outside_world_residual: the base-rate source for residual intensities

existing_v2.role: deterministic dated public facts + dated outcome-entailing hazard modulation

existing_v2.component: phase8_events.EventLog (observed_time filtering, corrections, tamper-evident chain) + evidence_temporal.TemporalVerifier (Wayback verification)
existing_v2.role: leakage-safe ingestion of the REAL outside world
existing_v2.fit_for_outside_world_residual: kind=external_adapter — the evidence/measurement feed, already leak-gated

existing_v2.role: documented structural-constant priors sampled per branch

v1_candidates_to_back_residual: swm/transition/future_events.py FutureEvent + SurpriseHazard (categorical outcome distributions at dated events + unscheduled shock Poisson) — port as exogenous mechanism whose events land on the v2 queue
swm/simulation/event_model.py calibrate()/interval_coverage() — fitted magnitude/frequency for surprise jumps
swm/simulation/directional_event_model.py — conditional (state-dependent) signed impacts at calendar events, corpus-calibrated elasticities via swm/eval/harvest.py

coverage_today.mechanism_id: lean registry: mech_id; phase6: family_id; scenario: mechanism_definitions key — three id spaces, no join
coverage_today.version: MISSING on lean entries; phase6 records/packs versioned; scenario schema versioned per branch; runtime_fingerprint.py hashes code
coverage_today.kind: PARTIAL — ontology_type (lean, 9 values) and phase6 ONTOLOGY_TYPES (20 values) both differ from the target kind list; no market/queue/operational/physical/legal/external_adapter anywhere; legal/physical exist only as scenario-schema physical_constraints and institutional rules
coverage_today.causal_role: present everywhere (free text; scenario mechanisms fixed to mechanism_mediated)
coverage_today.read_set_write_set: SCATTERED x3 — operator requires/modifies, event-type reads/deltas, Event.read_set/write_set; all advisory strings, never validated against StateDelta.changes
coverage_today.event_inputs: MISSING as declaration — encoded in each operator's applicable() code; only scenario mechanisms declare triggering_event_types
coverage_today.event_outputs: PARTIAL — StateDelta.follow_up_events at runtime; only scenario mechanisms declare possible_output_event_types
coverage_today.temporal_behavior: PARTIAL — temporal_scale enum (event|interval|scheduled|horizon) only; hazard/first-passage semantics live in code
coverage_today.parameter_schema: MISSING on lean/operator registries; EXISTS in phase6 ParameterSpec and nonlinear StructuralForm.param_schema
coverage_today.parameter_sources: lean: one free-text string; phase6: controlled 8-value vocabulary with per-parameter records — the vocab to adopt
coverage_today.units: MISSING on mechanisms — only quantity types carry units; operators register ad-hoc quantity types at apply time
coverage_today.conservation_rules: MISSING as declaration — enforced operationally in ResourceUpdateOperator.validate, causal_boundary escrow/settle/refund, scenario resource_definitions.conserved flag
coverage_today.validation_rules: PARTIAL — operator invariants tuple (free strings); institutions Rule kinds fail closed; no per-mechanism executable validation
coverage_today.calibration_status: THREE vocabularies (lean 4-value, phase6 9-value lifecycle, semantic registry 10-value) + unenforced (scheduled_facts uses 'deterministic'); operator validated=True universally overloads 'contract-tested' with 'calibrated'
coverage_today.domains: lean domains tuple + phase6 ApplicabilityRule/transport — not joined
coverage_today.operator: present (string key), but 8 operators bypass the registry via direct instantiation in materialize.py, and phase9_temporal uses its own Phase9Delta

shortest_path_to_typed_spec: 1. Add swm/world_model_v2/mechanism_spec.py: a MechanismSpec dataclass with the 19 target fields + a KINDS enum (institution, population, network, market, algorithm, queue, resource, operational, physical, legal, numerical, exogenous, measurement, external_adapter). Do NOT touch MechanismEntry/_OPERATORS.

2. Build specs by JOIN, not migration: from_registries(mech_id) merges mechanisms._REGISTRY (id, causal_role, required_state, calibration_status, domains, operator) + transitions._OPERATORS[entry.operator] (requires->read_set, modifies->write_set, temporal_scale->temporal_behavior.scale, parameter_source, invariants->validation_rules, validated/experimental) + events._EVENT_TYPES (reads/deltas for declared event types) + registry store (packs -> parameter_schema/parameter_sources/known_limits/citations where a phase6 record exists).

3. event_inputs: add an optional event_inputs kwarg to register_operator (default ()) and backfill the 32 existing registrations from their applicable() etypes (a static 32-row table; pure metadata, zero behavior change). event_outputs from a declared follow-up table + StateDelta.follow_up_events audit.

4. kind mapping table: ontology_type->kind (institutional->institution, diffusion->network, resource->resource, exogenous->exogenous, measurement->measurement, numerical->numerical, decision/belief/relationship stay actor-layer and are marked kind=null/actor — the spec covers world mechanisms, actor cognition remains Phase-4 policy); phase6 ONTOLOGY_TYPES + scenario executor_binding get their own rows (institutional_aggregation->institution, conserved_resource_settlement->resource, information_transport->network, event_scheduling->queue, population_response->population, generic_state_machine->operational).

5. Adopt phase6 vocabularies as the single source: PARAMETER_SOURCES for parameter_sources, the 9-status lifecycle for calibration_status (lean 4-value maps in: calibrated->production_eligible/locally_validated, prior->research_encoded/reference-prior pack, uncalibrated->implemented, experimental->proposed/quarantined); keep store.py mirroring but emit MechanismSpec instead of only MechanismEntry.

6. units/conservation: derive units from the quantity types a mechanism writes (require operators to pre-register their quantity types with units instead of registering at apply time); conservation_rules = declared {resource, rule: escrow|floor|closed_sum} mirrored from scenario resource_definitions and ResourceUpdate/settlement behavior.

7. Enforcement (later, behind a flag): a debug wrapper that diffs StateDelta.changes paths against write_set and logs violations — turning today's advisory strings into checked contracts without breaking any operator.

8. Scenario-generated mechanisms adapt via spec_from_mechanism_definition(md): version=schema version+content hash, calibration_status=experimental unless evidence_basis, kind from executor_binding, known_limits=assumptions+uncertainty_source.
